name: pipeline
description: Process a vector dataset applying several steps.

input_arguments.name: input-format
input_arguments.description: Input formats

input_arguments.name: open-option
input_arguments.description: Open options

input_arguments.name: input
input_arguments.description: Input vector datasets

input_arguments.name: input-layer
input_arguments.description: Input layer name(s)

input_arguments.name: quiet
input_arguments.description: Quiet mode (no progress bar or warning message)

input_arguments.name: pipeline
input_arguments.description: Pipeline string

input_arguments.name: output-format
input_arguments.description: Output format ("GDALG" allowed)

input_arguments.name: output-open-option
input_arguments.description: Output open options

input_arguments.name: creation-option
input_arguments.description: Creation option

input_arguments.name: layer-creation-option
input_arguments.description: Layer creation option

input_arguments.name: overwrite
input_arguments.description: Whether overwriting existing output dataset is allowed

input_arguments.name: update
input_arguments.description: Whether to open existing dataset in update mode

input_arguments.name: overwrite-layer
input_arguments.description: Whether overwriting existing output layer is allowed

input_arguments.name: append
input_arguments.description: Whether appending to existing layer is allowed

input_arguments.name: upsert
input_arguments.description: Upsert features (implies 'append')

input_arguments.name: output-layer
input_arguments.description: Output layer name

input_arguments.name: skip-errors
input_arguments.description: Skip errors when writing features

output_arguments.name: output-string
output_arguments.description: Output string, in which the result is placed

pipeline_algorithms.name: buffer
pipeline_algorithms.description: Compute a buffer around geometries of a vector dataset.

input_arguments.name: active-layer
input_arguments.description: Set active layer (if not specified, all)

input_arguments.name: active-geometry
input_arguments.description: Geometry field name to which to restrict the processing (if not specified, all)

input_arguments.name: distance
input_arguments.description: Distance to which to extend the geometry.

input_arguments.name: endcap-style
input_arguments.description: Endcap style.

input_arguments.name: join-style
input_arguments.description: Join style.

input_arguments.name: mitre-limit
input_arguments.description: Mitre ratio limit (only affects mitered join style).

input_arguments.name: quadrant-segments
input_arguments.description: Number of line segments used to approximate a quarter circle.

input_arguments.name: side
input_arguments.description: Sets whether the computed buffer should be single-sided or not.

pipeline_algorithms.name: check-coverage
pipeline_algorithms.description: Check a polygon coverage for validity

input_arguments.name: include-valid
input_arguments.description: Include valid inputs in output, with empty geometry

input_arguments.name: geometry-field
input_arguments.description: Name of geometry field to check

input_arguments.name: maximum-gap-width
input_arguments.description: Maximum width of a gap to be flagged

pipeline_algorithms.name: check-geometry
pipeline_algorithms.description: Check a dataset for invalid geometries

input_arguments.name: include-field
input_arguments.description: Fields from input layer to include in output (special values: ALL and NONE)

input_arguments.name: include-valid
input_arguments.description: Include valid inputs in output, with empty geometry

input_arguments.name: geometry-field
input_arguments.description: Name of geometry field to check

pipeline_algorithms.name: clean-coverage
pipeline_algorithms.description: Alter polygon boundaries to make shared edges identical, removing gaps and overlaps

input_arguments.name: active-layer
input_arguments.description: Set active layer (if not specified, all)

input_arguments.name: snapping-distance
input_arguments.description: Distance tolerance for snapping nodes

input_arguments.name: merge-strategy
input_arguments.description: Algorithm to assign overlaps to neighboring polygons

input_arguments.name: maximum-gap-width
input_arguments.description: Maximum width of a gap to be closed

pipeline_algorithms.name: clip
pipeline_algorithms.description: Clip a vector dataset.

input_arguments.name: active-layer
input_arguments.description: Set active layer (if not specified, all)

input_arguments.name: bbox
input_arguments.description: Clipping bounding box as xmin,ymin,xmax,ymax

input_arguments.name: bbox-crs
input_arguments.description: CRS of clipping bounding box

input_arguments.name: geometry
input_arguments.description: Clipping geometry (WKT or GeoJSON)

input_arguments.name: geometry-crs
input_arguments.description: CRS of clipping geometry

input_arguments.name: like
input_arguments.description: Dataset to use as a template for bounds

input_arguments.name: like-sql
input_arguments.description: SELECT statement to run on the 'like' dataset

input_arguments.name: like-layer
input_arguments.description: Name of the layer of the 'like' dataset

input_arguments.name: like-where
input_arguments.description: WHERE SQL clause to run on the 'like' dataset

pipeline_algorithms.name: combine
pipeline_algorithms.description: Combine features into collections

input_arguments.name: group-by
input_arguments.description: Names of field(s) by which inputs should be grouped

input_arguments.name: keep-nested
input_arguments.description: Avoid combining the components of multipart geometries

input_arguments.name: add-extra-fields
input_arguments.description: Whether to add extra fields, depending on if they have identical values within each group

pipeline_algorithms.name: concat
pipeline_algorithms.description: Concatenate vector datasets.

input_arguments.name: input-format
input_arguments.description: Input formats

input_arguments.name: open-option
input_arguments.description: Open options

input_arguments.name: input
input_arguments.description: Input vector datasets

input_arguments.name: input-layer
input_arguments.description: Input layer name(s)

input_arguments.name: mode
input_arguments.description: Determine the strategy to create output layers from source layers

input_arguments.name: output-layer
input_arguments.description: Name of the output vector layer (single mode), or template to name the output vector layers (stack mode)

input_arguments.name: source-layer-field-name
input_arguments.description: Name of the new field to add to contain identification of the source layer, with value determined from 'source-layer-field-content'

input_arguments.name: source-layer-field-content
input_arguments.description: A string, possibly using {AUTO_NAME}, {DS_NAME}, {DS_BASENAME}, {DS_INDEX}, {LAYER_NAME}, {LAYER_INDEX}

input_arguments.name: field-strategy
input_arguments.description: How to determine target fields from source fields

input_arguments.name: input-crs
input_arguments.description: Input CRS

input_arguments.name: output-crs
input_arguments.description: Output CRS

pipeline_algorithms.name: concave-hull
pipeline_algorithms.description: Compute the concave hull of geometries of a vector dataset.

input_arguments.name: active-layer
input_arguments.description: Set active layer (if not specified, all)

input_arguments.name: active-geometry
input_arguments.description: Geometry field name to which to restrict the processing (if not specified, all)

input_arguments.name: ratio
input_arguments.description: Ratio controlling the concavity

input_arguments.name: allow-holes
input_arguments.description: Allow holes in the output polygon

input_arguments.name: tight
input_arguments.description: Whether the hull must follow the outer boundaries of the input polygons

pipeline_algorithms.name: convex-hull
pipeline_algorithms.description: Compute the convex hull of geometries of a vector dataset.

input_arguments.name: active-layer
input_arguments.description: Set active layer (if not specified, all)

input_arguments.name: active-geometry
input_arguments.description: Geometry field name to which to restrict the processing (if not specified, all)

input_arguments.name: output-layer
input_arguments.description: Output layer name

input_arguments.name: geometry-type
input_arguments.description: Layer geometry type

input_arguments.name: crs
input_arguments.description: Override CRS (without reprojection)

input_arguments.name: metadata
input_arguments.description: Add/update dataset metadata item

input_arguments.description: Add/update layer metadata item

input_arguments.description: Set active layer (if not specified, all)

input_arguments.name: active-geometry
input_arguments.description: Geometry field name to which to restrict the processing (if not specified, all)

input_arguments.name: geometry-type
input_arguments.description: Geometry type

input_arguments.name: skip-on-type-mismatch
input_arguments.description: Skip feature when change of feature geometry type failed

pipeline_algorithms.name: external
pipeline_algorithms.description: Execute an external program as a step of a pipeline

input_arguments.name: command
input_arguments.description: External command, optionally with <INPUT> and/or <OUTPUT> or <INPUT-OUTPUT> placeholders

input_arguments.name: input-format
input_arguments.description: Input formats

input_arguments.name: output-format
input_arguments.description: Output format

pipeline_algorithms.name: filter
pipeline_algorithms.description: Filter a vector dataset.

input_arguments.name: active-layer
input_arguments.description: Set active layer (if not specified, all)

input_arguments.name: bbox
input_arguments.description: Bounding box as xmin,ymin,xmax,ymax

input_arguments.name: where
input_arguments.description: Attribute query in a restricted form of the queries used in the SQL WHERE statement

input_arguments.name: update-extent
input_arguments.description: Update layer extent to take into account the filter

pipeline_algorithms.name: info
pipeline_algorithms.description: Return information on a vector dataset.

input_arguments.name: output-format
input_arguments.description: Output format

input_arguments.name: open-option
input_arguments.description: Open options

input_arguments.name: input-format
input_arguments.description: Input formats

input_arguments.name: input-layer
input_arguments.description: Input layer name

input_arguments.name: features
input_arguments.description: List all features (beware of RAM consumption on large layers)

input_arguments.name: summary
input_arguments.description: List the layer names and the geometry type

input_arguments.name: limit
input_arguments.description: Limit the number of features per layer (implies --features)

input_arguments.name: sql
input_arguments.description: Execute the indicated SQL statement and return the result

input_arguments.name: where
input_arguments.description: Attribute query in a restricted form of the queries used in the SQL WHERE statement

input_arguments.name: fid
input_arguments.description: Feature identifier

input_arguments.name: dialect
input_arguments.description: SQL dialect

input_arguments.name: crs-format
input_arguments.description: Which format to use to report CRS

output_arguments.name: output-string
output_arguments.description: Output string, in which the result is placed

input_arguments.description: Limit the number of features to read per layer

input_arguments.name: active-layer
input_arguments.description: Set active layer (if not specified, all)

pipeline_algorithms.name: make-point
pipeline_algorithms.description: Create point geometries from attribute fields

input_arguments.name: x
input_arguments.description: Field from which X coordinate should be read

input_arguments.name: y
input_arguments.description: Field from which Y coordinate should be read

input_arguments.name: z
input_arguments.description: Optional field from which Z coordinate should be read

input_arguments.name: m
input_arguments.description: Optional field from which M coordinate should be read

input_arguments.name: output-crs
input_arguments.description: Output CRS

pipeline_algorithms.name: make-valid
pipeline_algorithms.description: Fix validity of geometries of a vector dataset.

input_arguments.description: Set active layer (if not specified, all)

input_arguments.name: active-geometry
input_arguments.description: Geometry field name to which to restrict the processing (if not specified, all)

input_arguments.name: method
input_arguments.description: Algorithm to use when repairing invalid geometries.

input_arguments.name: keep-lower-dim
input_arguments.description: Keep components of lower dimension after MakeValid()

pipeline_algorithms.name: materialize
pipeline_algorithms.description: Materialize a piped dataset on disk to increase the efficiency of the following steps.

input_arguments.description: Output format

input_arguments.name: creation-option
input_arguments.description: Creation option

input_arguments.name: overwrite

pipeline_algorithms.name: partition
pipeline_algorithms.description: Partition a vector dataset into multiple files.

input_arguments.name: quiet
input_arguments.description: Quiet mode (no progress bar or warning message)

input_arguments.name: output
input_arguments.description: Output directory

input_arguments.name: overwrite
input_arguments.description: Whether overwriting existing output dataset is allowed

input_arguments.name: append
input_arguments.description: Whether appending to existing layer is allowed

input_arguments.name: output-format
input_arguments.description: Output format

input_arguments.name: creation-option
input_arguments.description: Creation option

input_arguments.name: layer-creation-option
input_arguments.description: Layer creation option

input_arguments.name: field
input_arguments.description: Attribute or geometry field(s) on which to partition

input_arguments.name: scheme
input_arguments.description: Partitioning scheme

input_arguments.name: pattern
input_arguments.description: Filename pattern ('part_%010d' for scheme=hive, '{LAYER_NAME}_{FIELD_VALUE}_%010d' for scheme=flat)

input_arguments.name: feature-limit
input_arguments.description: Maximum number of features per file

input_arguments.name: max-file-size
input_arguments.description: Maximum file size (MB or GB suffix can be used)

input_arguments.name: omit-partitioned-field
input_arguments.description: Whether to omit partitioned fields from target layer definition

input_arguments.name: skip-errors
input_arguments.description: Skip errors when writing features

input_arguments.description: Force names to be usable as filenames

input_arguments.description: Reserved character(s) to be removed

input_arguments.description: Replacement character when ASCII conversion not possible

input_arguments.description: Maximum length of layer names

input_arguments.description: Exclude specified fields

input_arguments.name: field-name

input_arguments.name: input-field-type
input_arguments.description: Source field type or subtype

input_arguments.name: field-type
input_arguments.description: Target field type or subtype

pipeline_algorithms.name: set-geom-type
pipeline_algorithms.description: Modify the geometry type of a vector dataset.

input_arguments.description: Set active layer (if not specified, all)

input_arguments.name: active-geometry
input_arguments.description: Geometry field name to which to restrict the processing (if not specified, all)

input_arguments.name: layer-only
input_arguments.description: Only modify the layer geometry type

input_arguments.name: feature-only
input_arguments.description: Only modify the geometry type of features

input_arguments.name: geometry-type
input_arguments.description: Geometry type

input_arguments.description: Force geometries to MULTI geometry types

input_arguments.name: single
input_arguments.description: Force geometries to non-MULTI geometry types

input_arguments.description: Convert curve geometries to linear types

input_arguments.description: Convert linear geometries to curve types

input_arguments.description: Force geometries to the specified dimension

input_arguments.name: skip
input_arguments.description: Skip feature when change of feature geometry type failed

input_arguments.description: Geometry field name to which to restrict the processing (if not specified, all)

input_arguments.name: tolerance
input_arguments.description: Distance tolerance for simplification.
